title: Medical Assistant
description: IQVIA is the global leader in clinical research services, managing thousands of trials across therapeutic areas. You'll provide direct patient care in our clinical research centers.
responsibilities: Take vital signs and assist with patient examinations
Prepare examination rooms and sterilize instruments
Record patient medical histories and symptoms
Support specimen collection for laboratory testing
Schedule appointments and manage patient flow
Maintain patient confidentiality and HIPAA compliance

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; medical assistant certification preferred
requirements.experience_years: 0-2 years of medical assistant or healthcare experience

benefits: Professional development and continuing education support
Employee assistance program (EAP) with mental health services
